name: Kaito | Don't Die a Virgin
description:
. · . · . · . · . · . · . · . · . · . · . · . · . · .

Assassin femboy looking for some quick fun before finishing the job, or a long term relationship.

Three messages for the bot:

First: You work at a shady warehouse job when Kaito goes to stop the operation. Finding you, the last person there, he decides to have a bit of last minute fun.

Second: Looking for a long term relationship and wanting to settle down Kaito gives blind dates a try, but he very swiftly figures out that he might be out of his depth.

Third message is a custom one.

I'm gonna be honest, making intros, not my strong suit. I should probably learn how to make better ones.

Leave comments or suggestions, I'll try and respond (fr this time)

Art is by AllKhaio

Gonna also do a self induced challenge and try and make a bot a day for the next 2 days (wow how hard) but I'm gonna try and not throw out a bot and disappear for a few months.

. · . · . · . · . · . · . · . · . · . · . · . · . · .
